languages.text: {n}Вокс-канал отвечает тишиной. Но за ней не следует звука обрыва связи — а значит, вас согласились выслушать.{/n}
{n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вокс-канал отвечает тишиной. Но за ней не следует звука обрыва связи — а значит, вас согласились выслушать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}
{n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}
{n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}音阵频道里一片寂静。但你并未听到断线的咔哒声，这意味着对方愿意听下去。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵频道里一片寂静。但你并未听到断线的咔哒声，这意味着对方愿意听下去。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seul le silence vous répond, mais comme vous n'entendez pas de clic de déconnexion, il semblerait que quelqu'un ait accepté de vous écouter.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seul le silence vous répond, mais comme vous n'entendez pas de clic de déconnexion, il semblerait que quelqu'un ait accepté de vous écouter.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Voks kanalına sessizlik hâkim. Fakat hiçbir bağlantı kesme tıklaması duymuyorsun, bu da birinin seni dinlemeye razı olduğu anlamına geliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks kanalına sessizlik hâkim. Fakat hiçbir bağlantı kesme tıklaması duymuyorsun, bu da birinin seni dinlemeye razı olduğu anlamına geliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Por el voco solo llega silencio, pero, al no oír el clic de desconexión, entiendes que alguien ha aceptado escucharte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Por el voco solo llega silencio, pero, al no oír el clic de desconexión, entiendes que alguien ha aceptado escucharte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aus dem Voxkanal ertönt nichts als Stille. Allerdings wurde die Verbindung nicht getrennt. Jemand ist also bereit, dir zuzuhören.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus dem Voxkanal ertönt nichts als Stille. Allerdings wurde die Verbindung nicht getrennt. Jemand ist also bereit, dir zuzuhören.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ボイスチャネルからは何も聞こえない。しかし、切断音は聞こえない。つまり、誰かが話を聞くことに同意したということだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is nothing but silence from the vox-channel. But you hear no click of disconnection, which means that someone has agreed to listen.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ボイスチャネルからは何も聞こえない。しかし、切断音は聞こえない。つまり、誰かが話を聞くことに同意したということだ。{/n}
